ns0:entry.ns0:title: AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
Language: go
Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
Language: go
Autonomous penetration testing using a swarm of AI agents. Orchestrates recon, classification, exploitation, and reporting specialists with ReAct reasoning — supports bug bounty, continuous monitoring, and CTF modes. Built with Go, Claude API, and 7+ native security tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: avelino/awesome-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/avelino/awesome-go
Language: go
A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charmbracelet/crush
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charmbracelet/crush
Language: go
Glamourous agentic coding for all 💘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charmbracelet/glow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charmbracelet/glow
Language: go
Render markdown on the CLI, with pizzazz! 💅🏻

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dapr/dapr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dapr/dapr
Language: go
Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/cadvisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/cadvisor
Language: go
Analyzes resource usage and performance characteristics of running containers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keploy/keploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keploy/keploy
Language: go
Open-source platform for creating safe, isolated production sandboxes for API, integration, and E2E testing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/kubernetes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes
Language: go
Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mayswind/ezbookkeeping
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mayswind/ezbookkeeping
Language: go
A lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ossf/scorecard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ossf/scorecard
Language: go
OpenSSF Scorecard - Security health metrics for Open Source

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sartoopjj/thefeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sartoopjj/thefeed
Language: go
DNS-based feed reader and lite messenger for environments where only DNS queries work. Read Telegram channels and public X accounts, and exchange end-to-end-encrypted messages with other users — all over DNS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: smtg-ai/claude-squad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/smtg-ai/claude-squad
Language: go
Manage multiple AI terminal agents like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Amp.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailscale/tailscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailscale/tailscale
Language: go
The easiest, most secure way to use WireGuard and 2FA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: weaviate/weaviate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate
Language: go
Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.
